    Zirui Li

    PhD student @ IVRC in Beijing Institute of Technology and Visiting Researcher in TU Delft

    • Beijing, China

    Publications

    Table of Contents

    • Journal Articles
    • Conferences

    Journal Articles

    1. Zirui Li, Chao Lu, Yangtian Yi, and Jianwei Gong, “A Hierarchical Framework for Interactive Behaviour Prediction of Heterogeneous Traffic Participants based on Graph Neural Network,” IEEE Transactions on Intelligent Transportation Systems, 2020.
      @article{li2020gnn,
  title = {A Hierarchical Framework for Interactive Behaviour Prediction of Heterogeneous Traffic Participants based on Graph Neural Network},
  author = {Li, Zirui and Lu, Chao and Yi, Yangtian and Gong, Jianwei},
  journal = {IEEE Transactions on Intelligent Transportation Systems},
  year = {2020},
  publisher = {IEEE}
}
    2. Zirui Li, Jianwei Gong, Chao Lu, and Junqiang Xi, “Importance Weighted Gaussian Process Regression for Transferable Driver Behaviour Learning in the Lane Change Scenario,” IEEE Transactions on Vehicular Technology, 2020.
      @article{liiw2020,
  title = {Importance Weighted Gaussian Process Regression for Transferable Driver Behaviour Learning in the Lane Change Scenario},
  author = {Li, Zirui and Gong, Jianwei and Lu, Chao and Xi, Junqiang},
  journal = {IEEE Transactions on Vehicular Technology},
  year = {2020},
  publisher = {IEEE}
}
    3. Chao Lu, Fengqing Hu, Dongpu Cao, Jianwei Gong, Yang Xing, and Zirui Li, “Transfer Learning for Driver Model Adaptation in Lane-Changing Scenarios Using Manifold Alignment,” IEEE Transactions on Intelligent Transportation Systems, 2019.
      @article{lu2019transfer,
  title = {Transfer Learning for Driver Model Adaptation in Lane-Changing Scenarios Using Manifold Alignment},
  author = {Lu, Chao and Hu, Fengqing and Cao, Dongpu and Gong, Jianwei and Xing, Yang and Li, Zirui},
  journal = {IEEE Transactions on Intelligent Transportation Systems},
  year = {2019},
  publisher = {IEEE}
}
    4. Chao Lu, Fengqing Hu, Dongpu Cao, Jianwei Gong, Yang Xing, and Zirui Li, “Virtual-to-Real Knowledge Transfer for Driving Behaviour Recognition: Framework and a Case Study,” IEEE Transactions on Vehicular Technology, 2019.
      @article{lu2019virtual,
  title = {Virtual-to-Real Knowledge Transfer for Driving Behaviour Recognition: Framework and a Case Study},
  author = {Lu, Chao and Hu, Fengqing and Cao, Dongpu and Gong, Jianwei and Xing, Yang and Li, Zirui},
  journal = {IEEE Transactions on Vehicular Technology},
  year = {2019},
  publisher = {IEEE}
}

    Conferences

    1. Tijin Yan, Hongwei Zhang, Zirui Li, and Yuanqing Xia, “Stochastic Graph Recurrent Neural Network,” in arXiv:2009.00538, 2020, pp. 1–1.
      @inproceedings{yan2020,
  title = {Stochastic Graph Recurrent Neural Network},

  pages = {1--1},
  year = {2020}
}

    3. Xianqi He, Zirui Li, Xufeng Yin, Jianwei Gong, and Cheng Gong, “High-precision Target Positioning System for Unmanned Vehicles based on Binocular Vision (Chinese),” in Annual OFF-road vehicle conference, 2020, pp. 1–1.

}
    4. Zirui Li, Chao Lu, Cheng Gong, Jianwei Gong, Jinghang Li, and Lianzhen Wei, “Driver Behavior Modelling at the Urban Intersection via Canonical Correlation Analysis,” in 3rd IEEE International Conference on Unmanned Systems (ICUS), 2020, pp. 1–1.
